features.name: Product Features Tab
features.description: Dashboard tab that lists all product features with search, status filters, and action buttons (Mark Pass, Needs Test, Send to Debugger).
testChecklist: Features list loads from product-features.json
Search filters features by name
Status filter buttons work correctly
Mark Pass updates feature status to working
Needs Test updates feature status to needs_test
Send to Debugger marks feature as broken

features.name: Product Updates Tab
features.description: Dashboard tab that displays a timeline of product updates with type badges, file changes, and linked features.
testChecklist: Updates list loads from product-updates.json
Timeline displays updates in reverse chronological order
Type badges show correct colors
Linked features are clickable

features.name: Memory Log Tab
features.description: Dashboard tab that provides a file selector sidebar and JSON viewer for all product memory files.
testChecklist: File list loads from ProductMemoryService
Selecting a file displays its JSON content
JSON is formatted for readability

features.name: Bug-Feature Mapping
features.description: Maps bug reports to product features so the system knows which feature is affected by a bug.
testChecklist: Mapping creates a record in bug-feature-map.json
Mapping updates the feature's knownBugs list
Mapping supports severity levels: low, medium, high, critical

features.name: Feature Testing Pipeline
features.description: Runs smoke tests on features and records results in feature-test-history.json.
testChecklist: Smoke test creates a record in feature-test-history.json
Pass result updates feature status to working
Fail result updates feature status to broken
Feature confidence is updated based on test result

features.name: Product Updates Recording
features.description: Records product updates (feature additions, bug fixes, UI changes, etc.) into product-updates.json.
testChecklist: Feature addition creates an update record
Bug fix creates an update record
Custom update types are supported
Updates are stored in reverse chronological order
